channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Jay Graber Is Leaving Her Role as CEO of Bluesky
item.description: Graber is shifting to a chief innovation officer role.

item.title: AMI Labs | Milliardaire, la jeune pousse d’IA de Yann LeCun s’installe à Montréal
item.description: L’ex-patron de l’intelligence artificielle (IA) chez Meta débarque à Montréal. Figure de proue de l’IA aux côtés du Montréalais Yoshua Bengio et du Britanno-Canadien Geoffrey Hinton, le Français Yann LeCun officialise ce mardi la naissance de son entreprise, AMI Labs, qui aura ses bureaux à Paris, Montréal, New York et Singapour.

item.title: Google and OpenAI Just Filed a Legal Brief in Support of Anthropic
item.description: Enemies can be friends when their interests align.

item.title: New York lawmakers move to block AI chatbots from giving legal or medical advice
item.description: New York lawmakers are considering a bill that would stop AI chatbots from offering legal or medical advice and allow users to sue companies if the systems cross that line
